revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Portal|日本}} {{commonscat|Japan in the 920s}} {{BDDecadesInCentury|9|<!--10世紀-->|日本}} [[Category:920年代|にほん]] Category:10世紀の日...'

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
[[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2025 March 23]] closed as no consensus
Text replacement - "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]]" to "[[Category:Recent overwrite wikipedia pages]][[Category:Tier_1_Categories_with_enwiki]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
